title: How to extract MP3 audio from any MP4 video (free, in your browser)

segments.voice: Got a video. But you just want the audio?
Maybe it's a song from a downloaded video, a voice memo, or audio from an interview.

scene.headline:
Songs, voice memos,
interviews
scene.sub: video files with audio you want

segments.voice: The fix is converting MP4 to MP3. Tiny file, plays everywhere.

scene.headline: MP4 to MP3
scene.sub: smaller file, plays on every device

segments.voice: Free. No signup. Nothing to install.
Go to twineconvert dot com slash mp4 to mp3.
Drop the video. Click convert. Download your MP3. Done.
And your file stays on your computer the whole time. Link's in the bio, give it a try!
